title: pelargonium × rogersianum
intro: Pelargonium × rogersianum, also known as the Rose Geranium or Cape Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of the Pelargonium genus, a group of flowering plants native to South Africa. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils, particularly geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × rogersianum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oil extracts, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
